entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop used for production and improving soil nitrogen balance

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop used for production and generating net cash income

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of output per unit of input in smallholder farms

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a farm to generate net cash income

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of soil to provide nutrients for plant growth

entities.name: IMPACT
entities.description: Integrated Modelling Platform for Mixed Animal-Crop Systems used for capturing farm data

entities.name: HROM
entities.description: Household Resource use Optimization Model used to optimize net cash income

entities.name: APSIM
entities.description: Agricultural Production Systems Simulator used to simulate nutrient resource management in crops

entities.name: RUMINANT
entities.description: Model used to simulate nutrient resource management in milk production

entities.name: WEEDING
entities.description: The process of removing weeds to optimize maize production

entities.name: SOIL NITROGEN BALANCE
entities.description: The balance of nitrogen in the soil, affected by groundnut production

entities.name: SOIL PHOSPHORUS BALANCE
entities.description: The balance of phosphorus in the soil

entities.name: NUTRIENT BALANCE
entities.description: The overall balance of nutrients in the soil

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: Net cash balance generated by the farm

entities.name: LABOUR USE
entities.description: The allocation and use of human labor on the farm

entities.name: LAND USE
entities.description: The allocation of land for different crops

entities.name: FARM RESOURCE ENDOWMENT
entities.description: Available resources including land, fertilizers, manure, and labour

entities.name: MUREWA, ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The specific region where the study was conducted

entities.name: COWS
entities.description: Livestock used for milk production and fed with groundnut residues

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: General term for animals kept on the farm
